chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمُعْتَكِفِ لَا يَخْرُجُ مِنَ الْمَسْجِدِ إِلَّا لِحَاجَةٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 80 – The one performing Itikaaf cannot go out from the Masjid except for a need

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/434)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/434)
text: لَيْسَ عَلَى الْمُعْتَكِفِ أَنْ يَخْرُجَ مِنَ الْمَسْجِدِ إِلَّا إِلَى الْجُمُعَةِ أَوْ جَنَازَةٍ أَوْ غَائِطٍ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Fazalat Bin Ayoub, from Abdullah Bin Sinan,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘It is not upon the one performing Itikaaf that he goes out from the Masjid except to the Friday (Prayer), or a funeral, or defecation’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id from Fadalah ibn Ayyub from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that one in the state of Ttikaf must not go out of the Masjid unless it is for Friday Salat (prayer) or a funeral or defecation.”
